query: Show me books by Shoghi Effendi
response: Shoghi Effendi, as the Guardian of the Bahá'í Faith, has written extensively to guide the community. His works, such as the ["Tablet of the Centennial"](https://siftersearch.com/library/Baha'i/Tablet%20Translations/shoghi-effendi_tablet-of-the-centennial#p1), offer profound insights into the spiritual and administrative aspects of the Faith. Additionally, his letters, compiled in collections like the ["Uncompiled Published Letters"](https://oceanlibrary.com/uncompiled-published-letters_shoghi-effendi/?paraId=para_7147), provide guidance on various issues faced by the Bahá'í community. These writings are essential for understanding the development and direction of the Bahá'í Faith under his stewardship.

query: What books by Moojan Momen do you have?
response: The library holds 146 works by Moojan Momen, including titles like Mazhar-i Ilahi (Manifestation of God) and Memorials of the Faithful: The Democratization of Sainthood. In his work, Momen explores themes such as ["seeking the world and leadership"](https://siftersearch.com/library/Baha'i/Baha'i%20Books/moojan-momen_an-introduction-to-shii-islam-the-history-and-doctrines-of-twelver-shiism#p1260), which offers insight into the historical and doctrinal aspects of Twelver Shi'ism.

query: What Hindu scriptures do you carry?
response: The library holds 127 Hindu texts across various collections, including Bhakti and Devotional Works and Epics. Among these, you can find works like [Gitanjali (Song Offerings)](https://oceanlibrary.com/hymns-of-atharva-veda) by Rabindranath Tagore and [Hindu Literature - Ramayana, Nala, Sakuntala](https://oceanlibrary.com/hymns-of-atharva-veda). The *Bhagavad Gita* offers a glimpse into divine vision, where Krishna tells Arjuna, ["I give thee sense divine. Have other eyes, new light!"](https://oceanlibrary.com/hymns-of-atharva-veda). Similarly, the *Upanishads* encourage us to make our hearts free from prejudice so that we may draw ["inspiration, love and wisdom"](https://oceanlibrary.com/hymns-of-atharva-veda).

query: How many documents are in the library total?
response: The library contains a total of 44,937 documents. These are distributed across various traditions, with the largest collection being Bahá'í texts, numbering 41,590 documents. Other traditions include Judaism with 1,418 documents, Buddhism with 858, Islam with 404, and Christianity with 208 documents. Smaller collections include Hindu, Zoroastrian, Tao, Confucian, Sikh, and Jain texts.

query: What Buddhist texts discuss mindfulness, and can you show me a key passage?
response: The Buddhist text known as the *Satipatthana Sutta* discusses mindfulness extensively. It asks, ["how does a monk remain focused on mental qualities in & of themselves?"](https://oceanlibrary.com/dhammapada_buddha), emphasizing the importance of direct awareness. Additionally, the *Dhammapada* advises that if one holds oneself dear, one should ["watch himself carefully"](https://oceanlibrary.com/dhammapada_buddha), highlighting the necessity of mindfulness in daily life. These teachings underscore mindfulness as a cornerstone of Buddhist practice.

scores.diagnosis: The response effectively identifies key Buddhist texts on mindfulness and provides relevant passages, but the quotes lack proper integration and one quote is misattributed. To improve, ensure that quotes are accurately attributed to their respective texts and integrate them more fluidly into the narrative.
